key_insights.insight: The benefits of statins are often exaggerated and the focus should be more on lifestyle changes for heart disease prevention.
key_insights.quote: The increase in life expectancy with statins over a five-year period, 4.2 days.

key_insights.insight: Medical knowledge is under commercial control, influencing doctors' decisions based on exaggerated drug safety and benefits.
key_insights.quote: Medical knowledge is under commercial control. This is the root of the problem.

key_insights.insight: One credible estimate suggests the third most common cause of death globally after heart disease and cancer is prescribed medications
key_insights.quote: One credible estimate suggeststhe third most common cause of death globallyafter heart disease and cancer is prescribed medications.

key_insights.insight: The most important biological phenomenon that leads to heart disease is Insulin resistance, which is linked to poor diet.
key_insights.quote: Over time, if your insulin is chronically raised too high, or if your cells become resistant to them for whatever reason, that is the most important driver of the development of these so-called plaques, these furrowing, these blockages in the arteries.

key_insights.insight: Stress has the same level of heart disease risk as smoking, high blood pressure, and type 2 diabetes.
key_insights.quote: The risk of heart disease linked to stress, chronic stress of more than a moderate degree, is actually the same as being a smoker or having high blood pressure or having type 2 diabetes.

key_insights.insight: Corporations can be psychopathic in their pursuit of profit, showing callous unconcern for safety and conning others.
key_insights.quote: The corporation as an institution is psychopathic when it comes to making money that means they have callous unconcern for the safety of others, repeated lying, conning others for profit.

key_insights.insight: There is evidence suggesting mRNA COVID vaccines may increase the risk of heart attacks due to inflammation.
key_insights.quote: What had happened was within eight weeks of taking those jabs, their baseline risk went from 11% chance of a heart attack in five years to 25% chance just within eight weeks.

key_insights.insight: Most serious aspects of COVID happened early on in 2020 and predominantly affected the elderly, if you were under 70, even from the beginning, your risk of serious harm from COVID is in the ballpark figure of the flu.
key_insights.quote: Most of the most serious aspects of COVID happened early on in 2020 and predominantlyaffected the elderly. We've got all of that data now that's been reanalyzed by one of the world'stop scientists. And even looking back now, essentially, if you were under 70, even from the beginning, your risk of serious harm from COVID is in the ballpark figure of the flu, right?

actionable_advice.advice: Reduce or eliminate added sugar intake to minimize insulin resistance and heart disease risk.
actionable_advice.how_to: Avoid sugary drinks, limit fruit juice, and be mindful of hidden sugars in processed foods. The maximum daily limit by the world health organization is six teaspoons.

actionable_advice.advice: Manage stress with breath work and meditation.
actionable_advice.how_to: Practice Raj Yoga meditation for 40 minutes per day or use a calming app for breath work exercises.

actionable_advice.advice: Optimize metabolic health to reduce the risk of Insulin resistance, a key cause of heart disease.
actionable_advice.how_to: Measure waist circumference, blood triglycerides, HDL cholesterol, HbA1c, and blood pressure. Aim to keep all parameters within normal ranges.
Maintain a heart rate of around 115 beats per minute while cycling, exercise biking, or another activity.

actionable_advice.advice: Improve health and reduce cortisone levels by Hugging.

memorable_stories: Dr. Malhotra recounts the death of his brother from viral myocarditis, which impacted his decision to specialize in cardiology.
Dr. Malhotra shares the story of how the government had 99 meetings with food industry and 0 meetings with public health.
Dr. Malhotra shares his personal experience with his mother's death in a hospital, highlighting systematic failures in the NHS.
Dr. Malhotra details his father's sudden cardiac arrest, questioning if it was linked to the COVID vaccine and the subsequent NHS failures.
Dr. Malhotra describes a cardiologist who treated 14,000 patients with Ivermectin and not a single one died of COVID.
contrarian_claims: The COVID vaccine introduction has had a catastrophic net negative effect on society, not a net positive effect as generally perceived.
The focus on lowering LDL cholesterol through statins is overemphasized, and the benefits of statins are often exaggerated in industry-sponsored trials.
That red meat isn't bad for your heart.
You don't need any sugar to function.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - The Doctor That Got Banned For Speaking Out: “We've Been Lied To About Medication & COVID!”, “After 2021 Heart Attacks Increased 25%!” Dr Aseem Malhotra
